stemHtml:
What is correct regarding the following D-ATIS?

WSSS ATIS F
0230 METAR
EXP ILS APCH SEGREGATED PARL OPS IN USE
ARR RWY 02L DEP 02C
JUNCTION OF TWY EP AND A3 INCLUDING RAPID EXIT TWY E3 SOUTHBOUND CLSD DUE WIP

WIND 010 04 KT GUST 23 WIND DIR 320 V 040
10 KM FEW 1600 FT
T 27/DP 26 QNH 1012 NOSIG
ARR TO ACK INFO F WITH APP ON 120.3 AND DEP WITH DELIVERY ON 121.65

options.a: A wind shear warning is in force for departure information F; wind direction is 010°, variable between 320° and 040°, and wind speed is 4 kt.
options.b: The ATIS message is based on the 0230Z METAR; some taxiways are closed due to work in progress.
options.c: Runway 02C is in use for departures; information F is available for all traffic on 121.65 MHz.
options.d: Dew point is 26°C; information F is available for all traffic on 120.3 MHz.
